allow: Bash(echo Register failed or python3 not available:*)

Bash(# Check the LIVE production endpoint directly - this bypasses local cache
curl -s -X POST https://postpilot-app-nine.vercel.app/api/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw '{"email":"v11check@postpilot.dev","password":"V11CheckPass9","name":"V11","businessName":"Check"}' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(d.get\('accessToken','FAIL'\)[:20]+'...' if 'accessToken' in d else 'REG:'+str\(d\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(# Get full token and brand, then test connect endpoint on LIVE production
REG=$\(curl -s -X POST https://postpilot-app-nine.vercel.app/api/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw '{"email":"v11live@postpilot.dev","password":"V11LivePass99","name":"V11 Live","businessName":"Live Test"}'\)
TOKEN=$\(echo "$REG" | python3 -c "import sys,json;print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)['accessToken']\)" 2>/dev/null\)

BRAND=$\(curl -s -X POST https://postpilot-app-nine.vercel.app/api/brands -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" --data-raw '{"name":"V11 Live Brand","industry":"tech","language":"en"}'\)
BRAND_ID=$\(echo "$BRAND" | python3 -c "import sys,json;print\(json.load\(sys.stdin\)['id']\)" 2>/dev/null\)

# Test Facebook connect - extract client_id from OAuth URL
FB=$\(curl -s "https://postpilot-app-nine.vercel.app/api/platforms/facebook/connect?brandId=$BRAND_ID" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN"\)
echo "$FB" | python3 -c "
import sys,json,urllib.parse
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
url=d.get\('url',''\)
params=urllib.parse.parse_qs\(urllib.parse.urlparse\(url\).query\)
cid=params.get\('client_id',['NONE']\)[0]
if cid=='YOUR_META_APP_ID': print\('LIVE CHECK: STILL PLACEHOLDER'\)
elif cid.isdigit\(\) and len\(cid\)>10: print\(f'LIVE CHECK: REAL APP ID \({len\(cid\)} digits\)'\)
elif cid=='NONE': print\('LIVE CHECK: NO URL RETURNED'\)
else: print\(f'LIVE CHECK: VALUE={cid[:6]}... \({len\(cid\)} chars\)'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(echo TOKEN_OK=$\([ -n '$TOKEN' ] && echo YES || echo NO\):*)
